heroTagline: Companies use AI to screen you out before a human ever sees your name. This fights back — using AI to get past AI, so the conversation becomes about your skills, your experience, and your value. Not a keyword score.
matchPageTitle: AI vs. AI — Get Past the Gatekeepers
matchPageDescription: Companies deploy AI to filter candidates before a human ever reads a word. Paste the job description and this platform deploys AI right back — analyzing the role against several hundred+ indexed portfolio documents, scoring alignment across hard skills, experience, domain knowledge, and leadership, then tailoring a resume and cover letter that speaks the exact language the hiring system is listening for. The goal isn't a high score. It's earning the conversation.
chatPageDescription: Ask anything about the candidate — answers grounded in indexed portfolio documents
